MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. ACTION SETTLED. VACATE TRIAL DATE. JUDGEMENT FOR PLTF FOR $1950.00 AND REST OF PREMISES AT 20-6TH ST., #215, SAN FRANCISCO CA.DEFT MUST VACATE PREMISES BY OCT. 1, 2004. OR, DEFT CAN STAY AT PREMISES, AND PAY REGULAR RENT OF $600.00 PER MONTH PLUS $100.00 PER MONTH, ON BACK RENT EFFECTIVE OCT. 1, 2004, UNTIL $1950 IS PAID OFF. DEFT TO BE SOLE OCCUPANT OF THE PREMISES. AND, EACH SIDE WILL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. PLTF CSL:DAVID G.MENDEZ,ESQ.;DEFT IN PRO PER; JUDGE PRO TEM:PETER HADIARIS;CLERK-BBSURRATT;REPORTER-JO ANN BRYCE; (DEPT. 218)
